description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a distinctive tan and white digital camouflage pattern on the headband and earcup exteriors. The headband is robust and padded, with a black inner lining for comfort and stability during use. The earcups are large, circular, and feature black mesh or foam padding for noise isolation and comfort, with subtle gold accent markings on the sides. The headphones have a modern, angular design with visible structural elements connecting the headband to the earcups. The overall build suggests durability and suitability for both casual and professional audio use. There are no visible wires, indicating a likely wireless design, and no visible controls or display screens on the exterior.
description: A pair of over-ear headphones with a tan digital camouflage headband, black padded earcups, and a modern, angular design. The headphones appear wireless and built for comfort and durability.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, black padded earcups and the full width of the camouflaged headband.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tan and white camouflage pattern on the headband and the angular connection to the earcup.
description_view_2: Rear angled view similar to the front, showing the earcups and the headband's inner black padding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the camouflage pattern and the structural design of the headband.
